query: How do I configure an n8n AI Agent so it returns structured JSON and uses a fallback language model if the primary one fails?
expected_behavior: Explains that an output parser should be connected via ai_outputParser
Explains that the workflow still needs the main ai_languageModel connection
Mentions enabling fallback on the AI Agent node
Mentions connecting a second language model for fallback behavior
Warns that the parser schema and system message must agree
May mention MCP addConnection operations with ai_languageModel and ai_outputParser
